stepsSummary: Log assisted pull-ups with decreasing assistance; check PR and trend graphs.
expectedSummary: Effective load (bodyweight minus assist) increases over time; PRs reflect this; no bogus spikes.

summary: BUG: UAT-014 Assisted pull-ups with effective load - Error: page.goto: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED at http://localhost:4173/
reproSteps: Log assisted pull-up workout using advanced assisted toggle.
Save workout and navigate to workout analytics.
Verify effective-load summary text appears in stats card.
Verify assisted session name remains visible in recent workouts.
expected: Effective load (bodyweight minus assist) increases over time; PRs reflect this; no bogus spikes.
recommendation: Fix the failing Strength flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-014 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Assisted exercise state is accepted by workout logger.
Verify: Analytics renders effective-load metric field.
